content:
MODULE: cosmos.compatibility.visual_canvas
FILE: cosmos/compatibility/visual_canvas.py (683 lines)
CATEGORY: compatibility

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Visual Canvas - HermesAgent A2UI Compatibility
=======================================================

Provides an agent-driven visual workspace matching HermesAgent's Canvas/A2UI system.

Features:
- A2UI markup parsing (XML-like declarative UI)
- Live canvas rendering via matplotlib/Stream

CLASSES:
- A2UIComponentType(Enum): A2UI component types.
- A2UIComponent: Parsed A2UI component.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict
- CanvasState: Current state of the visual canvas.
- A2UIParser: Parser for HermesAgent A2UI markup language.

A2UI uses XML-like syntax for decl
  Methods: def parse(cls, markup: str) -> List[A2UIComponent]
- VisualCanvas: Visual canvas for HermesAgent A2UI compatibility.

Provides an agent-driven work
  Methods: async def reset(self) -> Dict
  Methods: async def push(self, a2ui: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def eval(self, code: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def snapshot(self, format: str='png', max_width: int=None, quality: int=90) -> Dict
  Methods: async def navigate(self, url: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def click(self, selector: str) -> Dict
  Methods: async def type_text(self, selector: str, text: str) -> Dict
  Methods: def get_state(self) -> Dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_canvas() -> VisualCanvas
- async def canvas_push(a2ui: str) -> Dict
- async def canvas_eval(code: str) -> Dict
- async def canvas_snapshot(format: str='png') -> Dict
- async def canvas_reset() -> Dict
